admin_required: I need the Invite Users via Link permission to work properly.
admin_cache_wait: Admin cache can only be refreshed once every 10 minutes.
auth_added: ✓ Added {0} to the authorized users list.
auth_removed: ✓ Removed {0} from the authorized users list.
auth_is_admin: That user is already an admin and doesn't need to be authorized separately.
auto_left: I waited, I watched, I yawned... then I left the video chat.
auth_list_empty: No authorized users in this group yet.
bl_invalid: Only chat IDs and user IDs are supported.
bl_removed: ✓ This chat has been removed from the blacklist.
bl_user_notify: You've been blacklisted from using this bot. Reach out in the support chat for more info.
dl_cancelling: Hang on, cancelling the download now...
dl_active: Already downloading that file — mind waiting a moment?
dl_limit: Failed to process the file. Maximum download size is 200 MB.
dl_not_found: That download has already been cancelled.
error_no_audio: Moving to the next track... No audio source found in the file.
error_no_call: No active video chat found. Start one and try again.
error_no_file: Download failed. If this keeps happening, report it in the support chat.
error_tg_server: Telegram server error Telegram is having internal issues — clearing the queue and leaving the video chat.
error_rtmp: RTMP streaming isn't supported. Please stop the RTMP stream and start a regular video chat instead.
gcast_usage: Reply to a message to broadcast it.
gcast_active: Please wait for the ongoing broadcast to finish.
gcast_stopped: Broadcast stopped. (check log group) Sent to {0} groups and {1} users.
gcast_log: Broadcast Log User: {0} | {1} Command: {2} Use /stop_gcast to stop the broadcast.
gcast_end: ✓ Broadcasted the message to {0} groups and {1} users.
help_menu:
📚 Help Center

Welcome! Select a category below to explore my commands.

IconCategoryIconCategory
🎵Play🎶Playlists
⚙️Admin🔑Auth
🚫Blacklist🌐Language
🏷️Stickers💬Quote
😂Meme🛡️Sudo
🛠️Moderation📊Stats
💡 Tip: All commands work with both / and ! prefixes.
help_admins:
⚙️ Admin Commands

Control the current voice chat.

▶️ Playback

CommandDescription
/pausePause the current stream
/resumeResume playback
/skipSkip the current track
/stopEnd the stream

⏩ Seeking

CommandDescription
/seek <seconds>Jump forward
/seekback <seconds>Jump backward

🔄 Cache

CommandDescription
/reloadReload the admin cache
🔒 Who can use this?

Only chat admins. If you promoted someone recently, run /reload so the cache picks it up.
help_auth:
🔑 Authorized Users

Allow trusted members to control playback without giving them admin rights.

CommandDescription
/authAuthorize a user
/unauthRemove authorization
/authlistView authorized users
🎧 Perfect for DJs or trusted friends.
help_blist:
🚫 Blacklist

Prevent specific chats or users from using the bot.

CommandDescription
/blacklist <chat_id|user_id>Block a chat or user
/unblacklist <chat_id|user_id>Unblock a chat or user
⚠️ Before you run this

Blacklisted entities lose all bot access instantly — there's no soft warning tier.
help_lang:
🌐 Language

Change the bot language for your chat.

CommandDescription
/langOpen language selector
🗺️ Every group can have its own language — settings are per-chat.
help_ping:
🏓 General Commands

CommandDescription
/startStart the bot
/helpOpen help menu
/pingCheck latency & system status
/sudolistShow sudo users
help_play:
🎵 Play Commands

Play music using song names, URLs, or replied media.

🎧 Audio

CommandDescription
/play <song>Play by name
/play <YouTube URL>Play from link
Reply + /playPlay from replied audio

📺 Video

CommandDescription
/vplay <video>Play video by name/link
Reply + /vplayPlay from replied video

🚩 Flags

FlagEffect
-fForce play immediately
-vForce video mode

💡 Example

/play -f -v attention
💡 Tips
  • Search works automatically
  • Supports YouTube links
  • Supports replied media
help_queue:
📜 Queue

Manage the current playlist.

CommandDescription
/queueView queued tracks
help_stats:
📊 Statistics

CommandDescription
/statsDisplay bot statistics and resource usage
📈 What's included
  • CPU & RAM usage
  • Active voice chats
  • Uptime
  • Ping
help_sudo:
🛡️ Sudo Commands

📡 Broadcast

Command / FlagDescription
/broadcastSend a message to all chats
-userTarget users only
-nochatExclude chats
-copyCopy instead of forward

Example:

/broadcast -user -copy

⚙️ Management

CommandDescription
/restartRestart the bot
/logsFetch logs
/logger on|offToggle logging
/evalEvaluate Python code

👑 Users

CommandDescription
/addsudoAdd a sudo user
/rmsudoRemove a sudo user

📈 Monitoring

CommandDescription
/acActive chats
/activevcActive voice chats
help_moderation:
🛠️ Moderation

CommandDescription
/banBan a user
/unbanUnban a user
/modhelpModeration help
/tgmTelegram moderation tools
👮 Manage who can use the bot in your group.
help_playlist:
🎶 Playlists

Create and manage custom playlists.

CommandDescription
/pl {name}Play a playlist
/pl new {name}Create a playlist
/add {name}Add a track
/rm {playlist} {position}Remove a track
/pplay {playlist}Play playlist
/pshuffle {playlist}Shuffle playlist
help_kang:
🏷️ Sticker Tools

CommandDescription
/kangSteal a sticker
/kang {emoji}Steal with custom emoji
/delstickerDelete a sticker
/stickerinfoGet sticker info
/get_stickerExtract sticker file
📦 Supported Formats
FormatType
PNGStatic
JPGStatic
WEBPStatic
TGSAnimated
WEBMVideo

Max size: 10 MB
help_quote:
💬 Quote Stickers

Create beautiful quote stickers.

CommandDescription
/qQuote the replied message
/q {number}Quote a range of messages
/q rQuote as reply-style
/q r {number}Quote range, reply-style

✨ Features

  • ✅ Text
  • ✅ Photos
  • ✅ Stickers
  • ✅ Formatting
  • ✅ Profile pictures
📏 Maximum 10 messages per quote.
help_meme:
😂 Meme Stickers

Reply to any sticker and create a meme.

🖊️ Command

/meme top text | bottom text

🎨 Editor Options

OptionOptionOption
FontColorOutline
ShadowBlurOpacity
RotationBackgroundPosition

🔘 Buttons

ButtonAction
✅ Save StickerSave to your pack
🎒 Kang StickerAdd to bot's pack
🗑 DiscardCancel editing

start_pm:
# 👋 Welcome, {0}

I'm **{1}** — your modern voice chat music assistant.

> Stream music, manage queues, create playlists, and enjoy seamless playback.

---

### ✨ Quick Start

```text
• Add me to a group
• Start a Voice Chat
• Use /play <song>
```

Tap **Help** below to discover all commands and features.

</details>
